'''zhachaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemannite|zemannite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemannite|zemannite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhachaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæchæbæth|zhæchæbæth]] || [[word:zhæchæbæj|zhæchæbæj]] || [[word:zhæchæbæsh|zhæchæbæsh]] || [[word:zhæchæbæ|zhæchæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhachachabath|zhachachabath]] || [[word:zhachachabaj|zhachachabaj]] || [[word:zhachachabash|zhachachabash]] || [[word:zhachachaba|zhachachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhachabath|zhachabath]] || [[word:zhachabaj|zhachabaj]] || [[word:zhachabash|zhachabash]] || [[word:zhachaba|zhachaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhachafbath|zhachafbath]] || [[word:zhachafbaj|zhachafbaj]] || [[word:zhachafbash|zhachafbash]] || [[word:zhachafbaf|zhachafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhachabatha|zhachabatha]] || [[word:zhachabaja|zhachabaja]] || [[word:zhachabasha|zhachabasha]] || [[word:zhachabaka|zhachabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhachabath|zhachabath]] || [[word:zhachabaj|zhachabaj]] || [[word:zhachabash|zhachabash]] || [[word:zhachaba|zhachaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhachabathal|zhachabathal]] || [[word:zhachabajal|zhachabajal]] || [[word:zhachabashal|zhachabashal]] || [[word:zhachabakal|zhachabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhachabathatha|zhachabathatha]] || [[word:zhachabajaja|zhachabajaja]] || [[word:zhachabashasha|zhachabashasha]] || [[word:zhachabaka|zhachabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhachabathan|zhachabathan]] || [[word:zhachabajan|zhachabajan]] || [[word:zhachabashan|zhachabashan]] || [[word:zhachabakan|zhachabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhachabathaoro|zhachabathaoro]] || [[word:zhachabajaoro|zhachabajaoro]] || [[word:zhachabashaoro|zhachabashaoro]] || [[word:zhachabakaoro|zhachabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
